name: Credential Stuffing - Distributed Failed Logon Attempts
description: Detects credential stuffing by identifying distributed failed logon attempts from multiple sources against accounts. Covers web, RDP, and federated authentication brute force with breach database patterns.
query: event.code: "4625" and winlog.event_data.LogonType: ("3" or "8" or "10") and winlog.event_data.Status: ("0xC000006D" or "0xC000006A")
